title: coreopsis tripteris
intro: Coreopsis tripteris, also known as Green Headed Coreopsis or Blue Stem Coreopsis, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and blue-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis tripteris include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Coreopsis tripteris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal benefits, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
